detectors.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract UniswapExchange (UniswapExchange.sol#353-582) has payable functions:
	 - UniswapExchange.transfer(address,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#361-365)
	 - UniswapExchange.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#387-413)
	 - UniswapExchange.approve(address,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#417-425)
	 - UniswapExchange.batchSend(address[],uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#499-523)
	 - UniswapExchange.constructor(string,string,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#563-579)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
detectors.markdown:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract [UniswapExchange](UniswapExchange.sol#L353-L582) has payable functions:
	 - [UniswapExchange.transfer(address,uint256)](UniswapExchange.sol#L361-L365)
	 - [UniswapExchange.transferFrom(address,address,uint256)](UniswapExchange.sol#L387-L413)
	 - [UniswapExchange.approve(address,uint256)](UniswapExchange.sol#L417-L425)
	 - [UniswapExchange.batchSend(address[],uint256)](UniswapExchange.sol#L499-L523)
	 - [UniswapExchange.constructor(string,string,uint256)](UniswapExchange.sol#L563-L579)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether

detectors.description:
UniswapExchange.uniswapV2_control(uint256,uint256,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#487-497) should emit an event for: 
	- _saleNum = saleNum (UniswapExchange.sol#495) 
	- _minSale = token * (10 ** uint256(decimals)) (UniswapExchange.sol#491) 
	- _minSale = 0 (UniswapExchange.sol#491) 
	- _maxSale = maxToken * (10 ** uint256(decimals)) (UniswapExchange.sol#493) 
	- _maxSale = 0 (UniswapExchange.sol#493)
detectors.markdown:
[UniswapExchange.uniswapV2_control(uint256,uint256,uint256)](UniswapExchange.sol#L487-L497) should emit an event for:

	- [_minSale = token * (10 ** uint256(decimals))](UniswapExchange.sol#L491) 
	- [_minSale = 0](UniswapExchange.sol#L491) 
	- [_maxSale = maxToken * (10 ** uint256(decimals))](UniswapExchange.sol#L493) 
	- [_maxSale = 0](UniswapExchange.sol#L493)

detectors.description: solc-0.5.17 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.
detectors.markdown: solc-0.5.17 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.5.17 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- MissingEscapingInFormatting
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow.
It is used by:
	- ^0.5.17 (UniswapExchange.sol#1)

detectors.description:
ERC20Detailed (UniswapExchange.sol#303-347) does not implement functions:
	- IERC20.allowance(address,address) (UniswapExchange.sol#17)
	- IERC20.approve(address,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#21)
	- IERC20.balanceOf(address) (UniswapExchange.sol#9)
	- IERC20.totalSupply() (UniswapExchange.sol#5)
	- IERC20.transfer(address,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#13)
	- IERC20.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#25)
UniswapExchange.UNI (UniswapExchange.sol#559) is never used in UniswapExchange (UniswapExchange.sol#353-582)

batchSend(address[],uint256) should be declared external:
	- UniswapExchange.batchSend(address[],uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#499-523)
Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
_tos location should be calldata
